entries.name: PI_FIRMWARE_VERSION
entries.description: [PI][VERSION] Runtime firmware version sanity-check register for the platform-side mailbox-artifact handshake. Encoded as major*10000 + minor*100 + patch; 2.0.1 -> 20001. The canonical full version string lives in the emitted mailbox.json contractVersion field (tools/build_mailbox_artifact.py). Read-only from outside; not part of any alarm-layer or ladder logic.
